quality_docs: Food contact declaration for SS304 inner surfaces

variants_available.EU_UK_voltage: 220-240V/50Hz with Schuko (Type F) and UK (Type G) plug options

import_readiness.canada_gst_hst: threshold not yet met; ready to register on launch

compliance_preparedness.ukca: product files prepared; test lab booked for label review
compliance_preparedness.ce: based on IEC reports, CE self-declaration feasible; WEEE and EPR to be registered
compliance_preparedness.wEEE: will register in DE and FR via producer compliance schemes
compliance_preparedness.epr_packaging: ready to register in DE (LUCID) and FR (Citeo)
compliance_preparedness.jp_pse: pre-assessment done; need local representative and PSE labeling for the electric kettle and frother

pricing_objectives.currency_strategy: price to local charm points, include VAT where required; review FX weekly; use Amazon Currency Converter, hedge with Wise for supplier payments

expansion_goals_90_days: Launch Canada and UK first (phase 1: days 1-45)
Launch Germany and France next using EFN from UK/DE (phase 2: days 30-70)
Launch Japan with local distributor/IOR and PSE completion (phase 3: days 45-90)
risk_notes: JP PSE certification timeline could slip (2-6 weeks)
EU WEEE/EPR registration lead times vary by country
FX swings may impact EUR/GBP pricing; monitor exchange and adjust quarterly
Customer service language coverage limited (see team_capacity.md)
